section: ENG9_6 – Weathering the Storm in Ersama
title: Weathering the Storm in Ersama – Flashcard Concept Mastery
author: Harsh Mander

questions.question: Who is the main character of the story?
questions.explanation: Prashant is a nineteen-year-old boy who survives the cyclone and helps his village recover.

questions.question: Where was Prashant when the cyclone struck?
questions.correct_answer: At the block headquarters of Ersama with a friend
questions.explanation: Prashant had gone to Ersama, about eighteen kilometres from his village, when the cyclone began.

questions.question: How did Prashant and his friend’s family survive the rising water?
questions.correct_answer: They took refuge on the roof of the house
questions.explanation: The floodwaters filled the house, so they climbed onto the roof to stay safe.

questions.question: What food helped them survive during the cyclone?
questions.correct_answer: Tender coconuts from fallen coconut trees
questions.explanation: Two coconut trees fell on the roof, and the coconuts helped them survive for several days.

questions.question: How far was Prashant’s village from Ersama?
questions.explanation: Prashant walked through floodwaters to reach his village after the cyclone.

questions.question: Where did Prashant find his family after reaching the village?
questions.explanation: His family had taken shelter there along with other villagers.

questions.question: What leadership role did Prashant take in the shelter?
questions.correct_answer: He organised food distribution and volunteer groups
questions.explanation: Prashant led the villagers to collect rice, cook food, and help injured people.

questions.question: How did the villagers signal helicopters for food?
questions.correct_answer: Children lay on the ground with utensils on their stomachs
questions.explanation: This creative signal helped helicopters understand that the people were hungry.

questions.question: How did Prashant help orphaned children after the cyclone?
questions.correct_answer: He organised shelters and care for them within the community
questions.explanation: Prashant ensured that orphaned children were looked after by the villagers.

questions.question: What is the main message of the story?
questions.correct_answer: Courage, leadership, and community cooperation can help overcome disasters
questions.explanation: The story shows how unity and strong leadership help communities recover from tragedy.

notes.title: Youth Leadership
notes.content: Prashant shows that young people can take responsibility and lead their communities during difficult times.

notes.title: Community Support
notes.content: The villagers survive and rebuild their lives through cooperation and mutual help.

facts.fact: The super cyclone struck Orissa in October 1999 and caused massive destruction.
Prashant organised volunteers to clean the shelter and help injured villagers.
